privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetically generated CSV file created dynamically at /home/ga/Documents/tradeshow_leads.csv. It contains exactly 12 unique contact records corresponding to the tradeshow leads, which matches the expected contact count and cleanup arrays in the setup and export scripts.
